items.title: Notre Dame Football’s support staff is either the fastest or slowest in the nation
items.summary: With Pro Day here for the Notre Dame football program, there will be a lot of focus on what the 40 yard dash times will be from the players that weren’t at the combine — and from some that want to improve on their times. There are a lot of players that want in on […]

items.title: NFL DRAFT: Here comes Pro Day for Notre Dame Football
items.summary: We are just about a month away from the 2026 NFL Draft, and it is shaping up to be a good one for the Notre Dame football program. Collectively, the Irish players that went down to the NFL Combine did a nice job, but there are a handful of guys that weren’t at the combine […]

items.title: NCAA Tournament: Notre Dame takes down 3 seed Ohio State to head to the Sweet Sixteen
items.summary: Despite a really slow start to the game going down 11-0, Notre Dame kept their composure and fought back to take control and beat Ohio State, 83-73. The early minutes acted more like a wake up call, and it wasn’t just Hannah Hidalgo taking over (although she was insanely good). Four other Notre Dame players […]

items.title: Notre Dame Fencing Wins 2026 Men’s National Championship
items.summary: When the NCAA spit the fenching national championsship back to men’s and women’s from the co-ed format they had — do you think they thought about doubling up Notre Dame’s national championship trophies from here to kingdom com? They should, because male or female — Notre Dame keeps winning the ship. Notre Dame Fencing: NATIONAL […]

items.title: NCAA TOURNAMENT: Notre Dame takes care of Farfield, 79-60
items.summary: Notre Dame will advance to the round of 32 after beating the Fairfield Stags in the first round, 79-60. To be honest, the game was never really in doubt for Notre Dame, but they kind of slow rolled themselves into halftime. Hannah Hidalgo was incredible, and despite not getting a double double — she did […]
